name: Madrid
notes: Winter Shipping receptionist and Harlen's protégé who can open the way through the company's offices.
playingNotes: The 'receptionist', Marid, is a sultry woman with the charms of a noble consort and the legal mind of a piranha.
Let your guard down around her and she will convince you to sign over your cargo, your ship and your firstborn children to her.
She is Harlen's protégé and he intends for her to take on a bigger role in their criminal organisation in time to come.
